path: Problem: Populate each cell of a 2D matrix with all record IDs whose two attributes match the matrix row/column headers, concatenated into a single comma-separated list
Action: FILTER matching IDs by two criteria, then TEXTJOIN to concatenate the resulting list (optionally suppress blanks)

Observation: This works when each matrix cell corresponds to a unique pair of header values (row header + column header) and multiple records may match the same pair; FILTER returns a spill range that TEXTJOIN can combine into one cell
